signals.headline: Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
The Prague-Electra (Pectra) Upgrade is in final testing, promising wallet abstraction and validator efficiency improvements.[4] This is a confirmed development that could impact Ethereum's technical roadmap and future performance.

signals.raw:
March 2026 CPI Surges to 3.3% Year-Over-Year on Historic Gas Price Spike | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Consumer Price Index for March 2026 jumped 0.9% month-over-month and 3.3% year-over-year, driven by a **21.2% monthly surge in gasoline prices**—the worst single-month gas increase since 1967.[1][2] This represents the largest monthly inflation gain since 2022, triggered by the US-Israel war sen

signals.headline: Ethereum Institutional Inflows Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Institutional Inflows Surge | YES | HIGH confidence**
Spot Ethereum ETF inflows have reached all-time highs as of mid-April 2026, with the network showing increased activity in DeFi, staking, and Layer 2 ecosystems.[4][5] This represents sustained institutional momentum rather than a single breaking announcement.

signals.headline: Bitcoin Institutional Capital Continues Building | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Institutional Capital Continues Building | YES | HIGH confidence**
Nearly one billion dollars in weekly inflows into American spot Bitcoin ETFs persist despite Q1 2026 volatility, with major corporations like MicroStrategy doubling down on Bitcoin purchases.[5] This signals continued institutional confidence and capital deployment.

signals.headline: Regulatory Clarity Conditional on CLARITY Act | PENDING | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
Regulatory Clarity Conditional on CLARITY Act | PENDING | MEDIUM confidence**
Multiple forecasters have predicted Ethereum will set new all-time highs in 2026 conditional on passage of the CLARITY Act's key provisions, with April identified as critical for monitoring regulatory developments.[1]
